mapper.insert:
insert into proj_leader(project_id, user_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.delete: update proj_leader set del_flag = '2' where project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: select user_id from proj_leader where project_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = '0'
